name: obsidian
description: Opinionated toolkit for keeping an Obsidian vault organized, tagged correctly, and structurally healthy. 12 skills (9 advice + 3 orchestrator-shaped) covering tag taxonomy, frontmatter (Properties) schemas, folder architecture, filename conventions, Maps of Content, and vault audits. One agent (obsidian-agent) that knows when to use each skill. Four slash commands (/audit, /sweep, /cleanup-tags, /bootstrap) for the most common workflows.
